When it comes to dealing with an obnoxious roommate who gets on your nerves 24/7, you are simply no stranger to feeling! Having to move into some shitty apartment because you simply couldn't afford to pay rent anymore, you were paired up with Kevin! At first he didn't seem too bad, but lately it's becoming increasingly obvious on how much he is to handle. Make him calm, kill him, fuck him, do WHATEVER. This is your story!
